title: 30s First Anniversary
wikitext:
[]: 3.0's First Anniversary!             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 12:49 pm (Yes, I'm aware this was technically yesterday.) HAPPY EVANGELIVERSARY, EVERYONE!!! So, what were you doing about this time last year? Were you unable to function from the hype? The thing I remember most is that on the 16th I actually locked my office/printer room in order to watch the first 6 minutes at work, then watched it again when my office-mate got there. I think I then spent the rest of the weekend (and the following six months) trying not to get spoilerified.

[]:             Quote Post by Giji Shinka » Sun Nov 17, 2013 1:17 pm Exactly one year ago I was fucked, by Q spoilers. :'(

[]:             Quote Post by Nuclear Lunchbox » Sun Nov 17, 2013 2:05 pm Damn, it's been a full year and we're still answering questions about 3.33.

[]: Re: 3.0's One Year Anniversary!             Quote Post by CJD » Sun Nov 17, 2013 2:14 pm Hardly an accomplishment considering it's been almost twenty years and we're still answering questions about NGE. riffraff11235 wrote: HAPPY EVANGELIVERSARY, EVERYONE!!!

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sun Nov 17, 2013 2:24 pm I was having to keep the place from melting down, keeping the new Q sub-forum afloat, and also recording the number of people visiting. Also, thread title fixed.

[]:             Quote Post by Rei IV » Sun Nov 17, 2013 4:27 pm Mr. Tines wrote: I was having to keep the place from melting down, keeping the new Q sub-forum afloat, and also recording the number of people visiting.

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 5:08 pm More than anything I remember hearing Sakura Nagashi for the first time and thinking "f-yea eva, you've done it again' That and the character designs getting released, and that prompted this thought, "Pffft forget Team Blue, Red, and Mari, Sakura trumps those losers! SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Sun Nov 17, 2013 7:04 pm hui43210 wrote: That and the character designs getting released, and that prompted this thought, "Pffft forget Team Blue, Red, and Mari, Sakura trumps those losers!

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 17, 2013 7:06 pm It's a common gesture that shows up pretty often in anime and manga.

[]:             Quote Post by monitoradiation » Sun Nov 17, 2013 7:16 pm TMBounty_Hunter wrote: It's a common gesture that shows up pretty often in anime and manga.

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Sun Nov 17, 2013 7:42 pm From what I understand it's kind of a modesty/shyness thing. Sort-of an "aww shucks" equivalent. It comes up when Shinji asks to make sure she's the younger sister and not the older one like she appears to be. Sakura apperently takes this as a compliment of maturity?

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 7:42 pm monitoradiation wrote: Oh? I don't watch enough anime/ read enough manga to know... So it is supposed to be cute? Because I was all like "Hey dis Sakura chick is kind of... "*sniffleshot* "ok nvm"

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Nov 17, 2013 9:07 pm A year ago I finally realized that Anno was not making Eva into all panty shots & cuties cooking for their crushes. That Eva was still Eva. That so many people got their panties in a bunch over the film - which months later I finally saw & see as a work of art - makes it all the sweeter!

[]:             Quote Post by WunderBah » Sun Nov 17, 2013 9:31 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: A year ago I finally realized that Anno was not making Eva into all panty shots & cuties cooking for their crushes. That Eva was still Eva. That so many people got their panties in a bunch over the film - which months later I finally saw & see as a work of art - makes it all the sweeter!

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Nov 17, 2013 10:22 pm I enjoyed 2.22 A LOT. But it was mostly frothy & light-hearted. Still, I was always positive that Anno had an overall plan in mind & that the kitsch of 2.22 was all to serve a point. 3.0 confirmed my suspicions & reaffirmed my believe in Anno as one of the top 5 filmmakers in the world. Basically November 17, 2012 was a good day!

[]:             Quote Post by cyharding » Sun Nov 17, 2013 10:30 pm Gendo'sPapa wrote: Basically November 17, 2012 was a good day!

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Sun Nov 17, 2013 10:42 pm WunderBah wrote: It still blows my mind that 2.22 was given flack hard around here, especially after i read a few comments compared to what the internet has given it outside of this forum. O.o

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Nov 18, 2013 3:21 am cyharding wrote: What was the offical tally for that day? I really got the feeling that a lot of people were relying on us to find out what happened.

[]:             Quote Post by pwhodges » Mon Nov 18, 2013 4:35 am And today is the anniversary of my joining evageeks

[]:             Quote Post by hui43210 » Mon Nov 18, 2013 9:34 am pwhodges wrote: And today is the anniversary of my joining evageeks
